lesson_snippet.concept_explanation: Counting helps us know how many objects are in a group. We count one number for each object. The last number tells the total.
lesson_snippet.visual_model: Objects arranged in rows for one-to-one counting.
lesson_snippet.common_misconception: Skipping objects or counting one object twice.
lesson_snippet.lesson_summary: Count carefully. One number for one object.

steps.label: step_2
steps.content: Say one number for each apple.

worked_example.thinking_notes: Do not skip or repeat objects.
worked_example.reflection_prompt: Did I count each object once?

hint_ladder.hint_2: Say one number for each object.
hint_ladder.hint_3: Count slowly and check you did not skip.
